scenarioName: Update every in-repo reference after the rename

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Update every in-repo reference after the rename
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: All references to 'logme2' in 'src/', 'packages/', 'tests/', 'contracts/', and 'docs/' should be updated to 'logme'. The test suite should pass without any 'logme2' references. The 'report-truth' gate should pass with the renamed contract.
steps.observedResult: Cannot observe the actual state of repository references, test suite pass/fail status, or 'report-truth' gate status due to missing evidence.
